account_year.text: ปีภาษีที่จ่าย

book_date.text: วันเดือนปีที่ออกหนังสือรับรอง

root.sql:
select ai_year , id_card , member_name , address_pres , interest_paid , tax_paid , thai_tax_paid , membership_no , (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name , (select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name , (select manager_position from sc_cnt_m_coop) as position_name --ตำแหน่งผู้เซ็นต์ from ( SELECT sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year + 543 as ai_year , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card as id_card , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as member_name , sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no || ' ' || sc_mem_m_member_address.road || ' ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name ( sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol ) || ' ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name ( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code ) || ' ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_province_name ( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) || ' ' || sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode as address_pres , coalesce( sum( VIEW_FIN_TAX_DEP.PAID_AMOUNT ),0) as interest_paid , coalesce( sum( VIEW_FIN_TAX_DEP.TAX_AMOUNT ),0) as tax_paid , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ( coalesce( sum( VIEW_FIN_TAX_DEP.TAX_AMOUNT ) , 0) ) as thai_tax_paid
, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no as membership_no , 0.00 as pragan_amt , 0.00 as sumrong_amt
FROM VIEW_FIN_TAX_DEP, sc_dep_m_creditor, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_member_address , sc_acc_m_account_year WHERE ( VIEW_FIN_TAX_DEP.deposit_account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( ( sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '1' ) AND ( VIEW_FIN_TAX_DEP.TAX_DATE >= sc_acc_m_account_year.beginning_of_account ) AND ( VIEW_FIN_TAX_DEP.TAX_DATE <= sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account ) ) /*WHERE*/ -- and sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year = 2023
GROUP BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card , sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no , sc_mem_m_member_address.road , sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol , sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode , sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year
) order by membership_no
